summary: Completed Phase 1-6 Admin Control Panel testing. All 22 backend API tests pass. Frontend shows all 7 tabs working with proper data display and tab switching.
critical_code_review_comments: All 7 tabs properly implemented with data-testid attributes for testing
Sync Health shows overall_health_score, 24h sync trend chart, per-connector health scores
Error Queue properly displays sync_failed, import_failed, ack_failed counts with bulk operations
Production Readiness shows comprehensive checks (authentication, reservation pull/ack, inventory/rate push, mapping, reconciliation, encryption, RBAC)
Webhook endpoint handles HMAC signature validation, timestamp validation, and rate limiting
Turkish language labels properly displayed (Basarili, Basarisiz, Yenile, etc.)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing connectors
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Control Panel has 7 tabs: Sync Health, Reconciliation, Scheduler, Credentials, Error Queue, Observability, Readiness. All backend APIs verified working. Frontend tab switching works. Webhook endpoint at /api/channel-manager/v2/webhooks/{provider} handles JSON payloads with signature validation.

admin_panel_tabs.sync_health: WORKING - Shows overall_health_score, sync_trend_24h (chart), connectors array with health scores
admin_panel_tabs.reconciliation: WORKING - Issues list with filters (status, severity, issue_type), bulk dismiss
admin_panel_tabs.scheduler: WORKING - Returns connectors with stale_jobs, failed_jobs, trigger-all endpoint
admin_panel_tabs.credentials: WORKING - Masked credentials (RBAC enforced), encrypted status shown
admin_panel_tabs.error_queue: WORKING - Items list with summary (sync_failed, import_failed, ack_failed, total), bulk retry/dismiss
admin_panel_tabs.observability: WORKING - sync_success_rate, ack_success_rate per connector, audit trail logs
admin_panel_tabs.readiness: WORKING - Production readiness checks with passed/failed/warning counts, recommendation

api_endpoints_tested.POST /webhooks/hotelrunner: Accepts webhook payloads with signature validation

mocked_apis_note: All APIs use real MongoDB - no mocked endpoints
